sql_array: CREATE TABLE file_sizes (id Int32, size String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO file_sizes VALUES (1, '1 B'), (2, '1 TiB'), (3, '1048576 MiB'), (4, '256 KB'), (5, '5.5 GB');
SELECT id, sizes, parseReadableSize(sizes) AS byte_sizes FROM (SELECT id, arrayJoin(size) AS sizes FROM file_sizes) AS sub;
SELECT id, size, parseReadableSize(size) AS byte_size FROM (SELECT id, size FROM file_sizes WHERE size IS NOT NULL) AS sub;
SELECT id, size, parseReadableSize(size) AS byte_size FROM file_sizes WHERE byte_size = parseReadableSize('1 GiB') LIMIT 2;
WITH (SELECT arrayJoin(['10 B', '20 KiB', '30 MB'])) AS readable_sizes SELECT sizes, parseReadableSize(readable_sizes) AS sizes_byte FROM (SELECT arrayJoin(readable_sizes) AS sizes) AS sub;
CREATE TABLE temp_sizes (size String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO temp_sizes VALUES ('1 B'), ('NaN'), ('-5 GB'), (NULL), ('');
SELECT size, parseReadableSize(size) FROM temp_sizes WHERE parseReadableSize(size) IS NOT NULL ORDER BY parseReadableSize(size);
SELECT id, parseReadableSize(size) AS numeric_size FROM file_sizes GROUP BY id, numeric_size HAVING numeric_size > 1000;
SELECT parseReadableSize(size) AS byte_size FROM (SELECT arrayJoin(['1 B', '1 KB', '1 MB', '1 GB', '1 TB', 'NaN']) AS size) AS sub;
